_comment: 26 rectangular 20x10x5mm magnets on outer surface of 4" cast iron tube
_geometry: tube OD=4in=101.6mm -> inner_r=50.8mm; magnet radial=5mm -> outer_r=55.8mm, center_r=53.3mm; 10mm tangential -> arc=10.752deg at center_r; 20mm axial; pitch=13.846deg, gap=3.094deg~2.87mm at center_r
_magnets: 20x10x5mm NdFeB N52, radially magnetized, alternating N/S
